title: Better Trap Horse│更好的陷阱馬
description: Zombie Trap Horses can also spawn in Lightning, and Trap Horses can be triggered by any mob.│殭屍陷阱馬也可以在閃電中生成，陷阱馬可以被任何生物觸發。
body:
# Function│功能
1. Skeleton trap horses have a 50% chance of converting into zombie trap horses when they spawn.│骷髏陷阱馬生成時有50%概率轉換成殭屍陷阱馬。
2. The Trap Horse can be triggered by any mob, and when triggered, it produces a beam of light falling from the sky instead of lightning.│陷阱馬可以被任何生物觸發，觸發時會產生從天而降的光束而不是閃電。
3. When a Zombie Trap Horse is triggered, a zombie will spawn riding on the Zombie Horse, along with 3 additional identical Zombie Horse Riders. All zombies have a full set of enchanted diamond armor and an enchanted diamond sword.│殭屍陷阱馬被觸發時會生成一名殭屍騎乘到該殭屍馬身上，並額外生成3名相同的殭屍馬騎士，殭屍皆擁有全套附魔鑽石盔甲加上附魔鑽石劍。
4. When a zombie has a target to attack, the zombie horse it rides will enter a galloping state, doubling its speed.│殭屍有攻擊目標時，它騎乘的殭屍馬會進入奔馳狀態，速度翻倍。
5. If [Mobs Autonomous Ride](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mobs-autonomous-ride) (1.0.3 or above) is installed, adult zombies will automatically ride adult zombie horses.│如果安裝了[生物自動騎乘](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mobs-autonomous-ride) （1.0.3以上），那麼成年殭屍會主動騎乘成年殭屍馬。
